title: Contact the Health Product Compliance Directorate (HPCD) - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact the Health Product Compliance Directorate (HPCD)
In Canada, you may contact HPCD by calling: 1-800-267-9675
- Director General's Office
- Drug establishment licensing
- Drug shortages and discontinuations
- Good manufacturing practices (GMP) inspection program
- Good pharmacovigilance practices (GVP) inspection program
- Health product border compliance program
- Health Product Compliance and Enforcement - Compliance verification
- Mutual recognition agreements and international affairs

## Director General's Office
Toll-free (in Canada): 1-800-267-9675 Email: hpc.correspondence-correspondance.cps@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Drug establishment licensing
Email: hc.del.questions-leppp.sc@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Drug shortages and discontinuations
Email: drug.shortages-penurie.de.medicament@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Good manufacturing practices (GMP) inspection program
Email: drug.gmp.questions-bpf.medicaments@hc-sc.gc.ca
Telephone:  1-800-561-3350 Email: hc.qoc-coq.sc@canada.ca Province:  Québec
Telephone: 416-973-1600 Email: insponoc-coon@hc-sc.gc.ca Province/territory: Ontario, Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, Newfoundland and Labrador
Email: hc.hpil.gmp.west-ouest.ipsop.ibpfc.sc@canada.ca Province/territory: Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Alberta, British Columbia, Nunavut, Northwest Territories, Yukon

## Good pharmacovigilance practices (GVP) inspection program
Email: gvp-bpv@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Health product border compliance program
Email: hpbcp-pcpsf@hc-sc.gc.ca

### National border centres (all provinces and territories)
Telephone: 1-833-622-0414 International telephone: 1-204-594-8061 Email: healthproduct-import-produitsante@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Health Product Compliance and Enforcement - Compliance verification
Email: hc.hpce-cpsal.sc@hc-sc.gc.ca
Telephone: 1-800-561-3350 Email: HC.qoc-coq.SC@hc-sc.gc.ca Province/territory: Québec, Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, Newfoundland and Labrador
Telephone: 416-973-1600 Email: insponoc-coon@hc-sc.gc.ca Province/territory: Ontario
Telephone: 604-666-3704 Email: hpcw-cpso@hc-sc.gc.ca Province/territory: Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Alberta, British Columbia, Nunavut, Northwest Territories, Yukon

## Mutual recognition agreements and international affairs
Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada) Email: drug.international.affairs-affaires.internationales.drogue@hc-sc.gc.ca
